import pytest
from source import powerset

def test_powerset_includes_all_subsets():
    result = powerset([1, 2])
    expected = [[], [1], [2], [1, 2]]
    assert set(map(tuple, result)) == set(map(tuple, expected)), (
        f"Expected subsets {expected} for input [1, 2] but got {result}"
    )
